(module fizzbuzz
  (fn main -> int
    (set args array (argv))
    (set n int (string_to_int (array_get args 0)))
    (for i 1 (add n 1)
      (if (eq (mod i 15) 0)
        (println "FizzBuzz")
        (else
          (if (eq (mod i 3) 0)
            (println "Fizz")
            (else
              (if (eq (mod i 5) 0)
                (println "Buzz")
                (else
                  (println (string_from_int i)))))))))
    (ret 0)))

(module two_sum_finder
  (fn main -> int
    (set args array (argv))
    (set target int (string_to_int (array_get args 0)))
    (set nums_str string (array_get args 1))
    (set nums array (string_split nums_str " "))
    
    (set len int (array_length nums))
    (set found bool false)
    (set result_i int -1)
    (set result_j int -1)
    
    (for i 0 len
      (if found (break))
      (for j (add i 1) len
        (set num_i int (string_to_int (array_get nums i)))
        (set num_j int (string_to_int (array_get nums j)))
        (if (eq (add num_i num_j) target)
          (set found true)
          (set result_i i)
          (set result_j j)
          (break))))
    
    (if found
      (println (string_format "{} {}" result_i result_j))
      (println -1))
    
    (ret 0)))

(module word_freq
  (fn main -> int
    (set args array (argv))
    (if (eq (array_length args) 0)
      (ret 1))
    
    (set text string (array_get args 0))
    (set words array (string_split text " "))
    
    (set freq map (map_new))
    
    (for-each word string words
      (if (gt (string_length word) 0)
        (set lower_word string (string_to_lower word))
        (if (map_has freq lower_word)
          (set count int (map_get freq lower_word))
          (set freq (map_set freq lower_word (add count 1)))
          (else
            (set freq (map_set freq lower_word 1))))))
    
    (set keys array (map_keys freq))
    (set sorted_keys array (array_sort keys))
    
    (for-each key string sorted_keys
      (set count int (map_get freq key))
      (println (string_format "{} {}" key (string_from_int count))))
    
    (ret 0)))

(module bracket_checker
  (fn get_char s string idx int -> string
    (ret (char_from_code (string_get s idx))))
  
  (fn is_opening c string -> bool
    (or (eq c "(") (or (eq c "[") (eq c "{"))))
  
  (fn is_closing c string -> bool
    (or (eq c ")") (or (eq c "]") (eq c "}"))))
  
  (fn matches open_b string close_b string -> bool
    (or (and (eq open_b "(") (eq close_b ")"))
        (or (and (eq open_b "[") (eq close_b "]"))
            (and (eq open_b "{") (eq close_b "}")))))
  
  (fn is_balanced input string -> bool
    (set stack array (array_new))
    (set len int (string_length input))
    (for i 0 len
      (set ch string (get_char input i))
      (if (is_opening ch)
        (set stack (array_push stack ch))
      )
      (if (is_closing ch)
        (if (eq (array_length stack) 0)
          (ret false)
        )
        (set top string (array_get stack (sub (array_length stack) 1)))
        (if (not (matches top ch))
          (ret false)
        )
        (set stack (array_pop stack))
      )
    )
    (ret (eq (array_length stack) 0))
  )
  
  (fn main -> int
    (set args array (argv))
    (if (eq (array_length args) 0)
      (ret 1)
    )
    (set input string (array_get args 0))
    (if (is_balanced input)
      (println "true")
    (else
      (println "false")
    ))
    (ret 0)
  )
)

(module bracket_checker
  (fn get_char s string idx int -> string
    (ret (char_from_code (string_get s idx))))
  
  (fn is_opening c string -> bool
    (cond
      ((eq c "(") (ret true))
      ((eq c "[") (ret true))
      ((eq c "{") (ret true))
      (true (ret false))))
  
  (fn is_closing c string -> bool
    (cond
      ((eq c ")") (ret true))
      ((eq c "]") (ret true))
      ((eq c "}") (ret true))
      (true (ret false))))
  
  (fn matches open_b string close_b string -> bool
    (cond
      ((eq open_b "(") (ret (eq close_b ")")))
      ((eq open_b "[") (ret (eq close_b "]")))
      ((eq open_b "{") (ret (eq close_b "}")))
      (true (ret false))))
  
  (fn is_balanced input string -> bool
    (set stack array (array_new))
    (set len int (string_length input))
    (for i 0 len
      (set ch string (get_char input i))
      (if (is_opening ch)
        (set stack (array_push stack ch)))
      (if (is_closing ch)
        (if (eq (array_length stack) 0)
          (ret false))
        (set top string (array_get stack (sub (array_length stack) 1)))
        (if (not (matches top ch))
          (ret false))
        (set stack (array_remove stack (sub (array_length stack) 1)))))
    (ret (eq (array_length stack) 0)))
  
  (fn main -> int

    (if (eq (array_length args) 0)
      (ret 1))
    (set input string (array_get args 0))
    (if (is_balanced input)

      (else
        (println "false")))

(module run_length_encode
  (fn main -> int
    (set args array (argv))
    
    (if (eq (argv_count) 0)
      (ret 1))
    
    (set input string (array_get args 0))
    (set len int (string_length input))
    
    (if (eq len 0)
      (ret 0))
    
    (set result string "")
    (set i int 0)
    
    (while (lt i len)
      (set current_char string (string_slice input i 1))
      (set count int 1)
      
      (while (and (lt (add i count) len) (string_equals (string_slice input (add i count) 1) current_char))
        (set count (add count 1)))
      
      (set result (string_concat result (string_concat current_char (string_from_int count))))
      (set i (add i count)))
    
    (println result)
    (ret 0)))

import sys
from itertools import groupby

s = sys.argv[1]
result = ''.join(char + str(len(list(group))) for char, group in groupby(s))
print(result)

(module query_parser)

(fn main -> int
  (set args array (argv))
  
  (set query_str string "")
  (if (ge (array_length args) 1)
    (set query_str (array_get args 0)))
  
  (if (eq (string_length query_str) 0)
    (ret 0))
  
  (set pairs array (string_split query_str "&"))
  (set keys array (array_new))
  (set values array (array_new))
  
  (for-each pair string pairs
    (set parts array (string_split pair "="))
    (if (ge (array_length parts) 2)
      (set keys (array_push keys (array_get parts 0)))
      (set values (array_push values (array_get parts 1)))))
  
  (set len int (array_length keys))
  
  (for i 0 len
    (for j 0 (sub len (add i 1))
      (if (gt (array_get keys j) (array_get keys (add j 1)))
        (set temp_key string (array_get keys j))
        (set temp_val string (array_get values j))
        (set keys (array_set keys j (array_get keys (add j 1))))
        (set values (array_set values j (array_get values (add j 1))))
        (set keys (array_set keys (add j 1) temp_key))
        (set values (array_set values (add j 1) temp_val)))))
  
  (for i 0 len
    (println (string_format "{}={}" (array_get keys i) (array_get values i))))
  
  (ret 0))

(module query_parser)

(fn main -> int
  (set args array (argv))
  
  (set query_str string "")
  (if (ge (array_length args) 1)
    (set query_str (array_get args 0)))
  
  (if (eq (string_length query_str) 0)
    (ret 0))
  
  (set pairs array (string_split query_str "&"))
  (set params map (map_new))
  
  (for-each pair string pairs
    (set parts array (string_split pair "="))
    (if (ge (array_length parts) 2)
      (set key string (array_get parts 0))
      (set val string (array_get parts 1))
      (set params (map_set params key val))))
  
  (set keys array (map_keys params))
  (set sorted_keys array (array_sort keys))
  
  (for-each key string sorted_keys
    (set val string (map_get params key))
    (println (string_format "{}={}" key val)))
  
  (ret 0))

(module query_parser
  (fn main -> int
    (set args array (argv))
    
    (set query_str string "")
    (if (ge (array_length args) 1)
      (set query_str (array_get args 0)))
    
    (if (eq (string_length query_str) 0)
      (ret 0))
    
    (set pairs array (string_split query_str "&"))
    (set params map (map_new))
    
    (for-each pair string pairs
      (set parts array (string_split pair "="))
      (if (ge (array_length parts) 2)
        (set key string (array_get parts 0))
        (set val string (array_get parts 1))
        (set params (map_set params key val))))
    
    (set keys array (map_keys params))
    (set sorted_keys array (array_sort keys))
    
    (for-each key string sorted_keys
      (set val string (map_get params key))
      (println (string_format "{}={}" key val)))
    
    (ret 0)
  )
)

(module rpn_eval
  (fn main -> int
    (set args array (argv))
    (if (eq (array_length args) 0)
      (ret 1))
    
    (set expr string (array_get args 0))
    (set tokens array (string_split expr " "))
    (set stack array (array_new))
    
    (for-each token string tokens
      (cond
        ((eq token "+")
          (set b int (array_pop stack))
          (set a int (array_pop stack))
          (array_push stack (add a b)))
        ((eq token "-")
          (set b int (array_pop stack))
          (set a int (array_pop stack))
          (array_push stack (sub a b)))
        ((eq token "*")
          (set b int (array_pop stack))
          (set a int (array_pop stack))
          (array_push stack (mul a b)))
        ((eq token "/")
          (set b int (array_pop stack))
          (set a int (array_pop stack))
          (array_push stack (div a b)))
        (true
          (array_push stack (string_to_int token)))))
    
    (set result int (array_pop stack))
    (println result)
    (ret 0)))

(module matrix-transpose
  (fn parse_row row:string -> array
    (ret (string_split row ",")))
  
  (fn parse_matrix matrix_str:string -> array
    (set rows array (string_split matrix_str ";"))
    (set result array (array_new))
    (for-each row string rows
      (set parsed_row array (parse_row row))
      (set result (array_push result parsed_row)))
    (ret result))
  
  (fn transpose matrix:array -> array
    (if (eq (array_length matrix) 0)
      (ret (array_new)))
    (set first_row array (array_get matrix 0))
    (set num_cols int (array_length first_row))
    (set result array (array_new))
    (for col 0 num_cols
      (set new_row array (array_new))
      (for-each row array matrix
        (set val string (array_get row col))
        (set new_row (array_push new_row val)))
      (set result (array_push result new_row)))
    (ret result))
  
  (fn format_matrix matrix:array -> string
    (set lines array (array_new))
    (for-each row array matrix
      (set line string (string_join row ","))
      (set lines (array_push lines line)))
    (ret (string_join lines "\n")))
  
  (fn main -> int
    (set args array (argv))
    (if (eq (array_length args) 0)
      (ret 1))
    (set matrix_str string (array_get args 0))
    (set matrix array (parse_matrix matrix_str))
    (set transposed array (transpose matrix))
    (set output string (format_matrix transposed))
    (println output)
    (ret 0)))

(module matrix-transpose
  (fn parse_row row string -> array
    (ret (string_split row ",")))
  
  (fn parse_matrix matrix_str string -> array
    (set rows array (string_split matrix_str ";"))
    (set result array (array_new))
    (for-each row string rows
      (set parsed_row array (parse_row row))
      (set result (array_push result parsed_row)))
    (ret result))
  
  (fn transpose matrix array -> array
    (if (eq (array_length matrix) 0)
      (ret (array_new)))
    (set first_row array (array_get matrix 0))
    (set num_cols int (array_length first_row))
    (set result array (array_new))
    (for col 0 num_cols
      (set new_row array (array_new))
      (for-each row array matrix
        (set val string (array_get row col))
        (set new_row (array_push new_row val)))
      (set result (array_push result new_row)))
    (ret result))
  
  (fn format_matrix matrix array -> string
    (set lines array (array_new))
    (for-each row array matrix
      (set line string (string_join row ","))
      (set lines (array_push lines line)))
    (ret (string_join lines "\n")))
  
  (fn main -> int
    (set args array (argv))
    (if (eq (array_length args) 0)
      (ret 1))
    (set matrix_str string (array_get args 0))
    (set matrix array (parse_matrix matrix_str))
    (set transposed array (transpose matrix))
    (set output string (format_matrix transposed))
    (println output)
    (ret 0)))

import sys

matrix_str = sys.argv[1]
rows = matrix_str.split(';')
matrix = [row.split(',') for row in rows]

transposed = list(zip(*matrix))

for row in transposed:
    print(','.join(row))

(module caesar
  (fn shift_char c int shift int -> int
    (if (and (ge c 65) (le c 90))
      (set pos int (sub c 65))
      (set new_pos int (add pos shift))
      (set wrapped int (mod (add new_pos 260) 26))
      (ret (add 65 wrapped)))
    (if (and (ge c 97) (le c 122))
      (set pos int (sub c 97))
      (set new_pos int (add pos shift))
      (set wrapped int (mod (add new_pos 260) 26))
      (ret (add 97 wrapped)))
    (ret c))

  (fn process_message msg string shift int -> string
    (set result string "")
    (set len int (string_length msg))
    (set i int 0)
    (while (lt i len)
      (set char_code int (string_get msg i))
      (set shifted_code int (shift_char char_code shift))
      (set result (string_concat result (char_from_code shifted_code)))
      (set i (add i 1)))
    (ret result))

  (fn main -> int
    (set args array (argv))
    (set argc int (array_length args))
    (if (ne argc 3)
      (ret 1))
    (set mode string (array_get args 0))
    (set shift_str string (array_get args 1))
    (set message string (array_get args 2))
    (set shift int (string_to_int shift_str))
    (if (string_equals mode "decode")
      (set shift (neg shift)))
    (set result string (process_message message shift))
    (println result)
    (ret 0)))
